intro: Viviania psychotrioides, also known as "Guanabano" or "Anisado de Cabezón", is a plant species within the family Caryophyllaceae, native to the Andean region of South America. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including stress, anxiety, insomnia, and pain relief, due to its potential sedative, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties.
